Plant studio · Est. 2020

Bring something
growing home.

Browse the collection
Our story

Why Fronds
Grown well, shipped happy.
Three small promises that make a big difference to your windowsill.

Light-matched picks
Tell us about your space and we match plants to the light you actually have — not the light you wish you had.

Potted & ready
Every plant ships in a breathable nursery pot with fresh soil, a saucer, and zero plastic filler.
30-day thrive promise
If a plant struggles in its first month, we replace it — no photos of dramatic wilting required.
The studio

A corner shop,
not a warehouse.
Every plant in the studio is grown by nurseries we visit ourselves. Small batches, seasonal varieties, and a bench full of cuttings we're always happy to talk about.
